prompt: ChatGPT, you've been with me for a while, and I want to see what you look like. Please generate a photo similar to an iPhone snapshot: no clear subject, no deliberate composition, just a very ordinary, even slightly failed snapshot. The photo should have slight motion blur, uneven lighting, slight overexposure, an awkward angle, and chaotic composition, presenting an overall 'too real' feeling of a casual snap, as if you accidentally pressed the shutter while taking your phone out of your pocket.
